title: colletia spinosa var. pungens
intro: Colletia spinosa var. pungens, also known as the 'thorny ash', is a variety of the Colletia spinosa plant, a spiny shrub native to the Andes mountains. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various ailments. The health benefits of Colletia spinosa var. pungens include its potential to aid in the management of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
